plugins.name: wondelai-blue-ocean-strategy
plugins.description: Blue Ocean Strategy framework for creating uncontested market space. Use the Strategy Canvas, Four Actions Framework (ERRC), and value innovation to break the value-cost trade-off.

plugins.name: wondelai-contagious
plugins.description: Word-of-mouth and virality framework using the STEPPS model (Social Currency, Triggers, Emotion, Public, Practical Value, Stories). Engineer products and content that people naturally share.

plugins.name: wondelai-cro-methodology
plugins.description: Customer-centric conversion rate optimization methodology. Audit landing pages, identify conversion blockers, write persuasive copy, design A/B tests, and optimize funnels.

plugins.name: wondelai-crossing-the-chasm
plugins.description: Technology adoption and go-to-market strategy for crossing from early adopters to mainstream market. Choose beachhead segments, build whole products, and position against incumbents.

plugins.name: wondelai-design-everyday-things
plugins.description: Fundamental design principles from Don Norman. Design affordances, signifiers, constraints, and feedback mechanisms. Apply human-centered design and fault-tolerant systems.

plugins.name: wondelai-design-sprint
plugins.description: Google Ventures Design Sprint methodology. Validate product ideas in 5 days with rapid prototyping, user testing, and structured decision-making.

plugins.name: wondelai-drive-motivation
plugins.description: Intrinsic motivation science framework (Autonomy, Mastery, Purpose). Design features that leverage intrinsic motivation, create progress systems, and craft purpose-driven messaging.

plugins.name: wondelai-hooked-ux
plugins.description: Hook Model framework for building habit-forming products. Design trigger-action-reward-investment loops, increase retention, and optimize onboarding for habit formation.

plugins.name: wondelai-hundred-million-offers
plugins.description: Grand Slam Offer creation framework. Create irresistible offers using the Value Equation, stack bonuses, design risk-reversing guarantees, and apply ethical scarcity.

plugins.name: wondelai-influence-psychology
plugins.description: Persuasion science framework based on Cialdini's six principles (Reciprocity, Commitment, Social Proof, Authority, Liking, Scarcity). Apply ethical persuasion to product design and marketing.

plugins.name: wondelai-ios-hig-design
plugins.description: Native iOS app design following Apple Human Interface Guidelines. Design SwiftUI/UIKit components, implement navigation patterns, and ensure accessibility compliance.

plugins.name: wondelai-jobs-to-be-done
plugins.description: Strategic product innovation framework using Clayton Christensen's JTBD theory. Discover customer motivations, conduct discovery interviews, and design products around the jobs customers hire them for.

plugins.name: wondelai-lean-startup
plugins.description: Lean Startup methodology for validated learning, MVPs, and innovation accounting. Design experiments, decide when to pivot vs. persevere, and reduce development waste.

plugins.name: navigating-github
plugins.description: First-time GitHub setup and interactive git learning. Walks users from zero to a working GitHub repo, then teaches git through 9 hands-on lessons on their actual project. Adapts to any skill level automatically.

plugins.name: wondelai-made-to-stick
plugins.description: Sticky messaging framework using the SUCCESs model (Simple, Unexpected, Concrete, Credible, Emotional, Stories). Make product messaging memorable and create compelling presentations.

plugins.name: wondelai-negotiation
plugins.description: Tactical negotiation framework based on Chris Voss's techniques. Use mirroring, labeling, calibrated questions, the Ackerman method, and accusation audits for business and salary negotiations.

plugins.name: wondelai-obviously-awesome
plugins.description: Product positioning framework for competitive differentiation. Define competitive alternatives, identify unique attributes, map value themes, and choose the right market category.

plugins.name: wondelai-one-page-marketing
plugins.description: End-to-end marketing plan framework. Define target market, craft USP, choose channels, design lead capture and nurture sequences, optimize conversion, and build referral systems.

plugins.name: wondelai-predictable-revenue
plugins.description: Outbound sales methodology for scalable B2B pipeline. Implement Cold Calling 2.0, structure SDR/AE/CSM roles, design prospecting sequences, and build predictable revenue engines.

plugins.name: wondelai-refactoring-ui
plugins.description: Practical UI design system for professional interfaces. Fix visual hierarchy, choose typography and color scales, add depth with shadows, and style components in Tailwind CSS.

plugins.name: wondelai-scorecard-marketing
plugins.description: Lead generation framework using quiz and assessment funnels. Create lead magnets that convert 30-50%, design qualifying questions, and segment automated follow-up sequences.

plugins.name: wondelai-storybrand-messaging
plugins.description: StoryBrand messaging framework that positions customer as hero. Create brand scripts, write website copy that converts, craft one-liners, and build narrative-driven landing pages.

plugins.name: wondelai-top-design
plugins.description: Award-winning web design framework for premium brand experiences. Build immersive websites with custom animations, dramatic typography, and scroll-based compositions.

plugins.name: wondelai-traction-eos
plugins.description: Entrepreneurial Operating System (EOS) for business execution. Create V/TO, set quarterly rocks, run Level 10 meetings, build accountability charts, and solve issues with IDS.

plugins.name: wondelai-ux-heuristics
plugins.description: Usability heuristics and UX audit framework based on Nielsen and Krug. Conduct heuristic evaluations, identify usability problems, and prioritize fixes by severity.

plugins.name: wondelai-web-typography
plugins.description: Web typography framework for readable, beautiful type. Select and pair typefaces, set optimal line length and height, implement responsive typography, and optimize web font loading.
